reason: Successfully tested agent message sending and response verification. Agent "QA-20260603-200305-5mle" received message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing SuperAgent home page with sidebar containing agent list.
Found the "QA-20260603-200305-5mle" agent in the sidebar — Agent was visible in the "Your Agents" section with "idle" status indicator.
Clicked on the "QA-20260603-200305-5mle" agent — Agent detail page loaded, showing agent name at top, status "idle" in header, and empty chat view with message input field.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle" as shown in the status indicator (ref=e163).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the input field — Message was successfully entered in the textbox (ref=e177).
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created.
Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Response was received within approximately 2 seconds, as indicated by "Worked for 2s" message.

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent responded with "4", which is the correct answer to 2+2. Screenshot captured showing the conversation with user message on the right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and agent response on the left ("4").
